query: SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(projectKey, '-', 1) as source_prefix, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM projects WHERE productLane = 'pumps' GROUP BY source_prefix ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(projectKey, '-', 1) as source_prefix, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM projects WHERE productLane = 'pumps' GROUP BY source_prefix ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15;
